creator: jmp@alvorlig.dk
text:
The file "apr_dbd_mysql.rev-57.c" on ftp.dk.freebsd.org and ftp.freebsd.org does not have the SHA256- and MD5-sum specified in the ports' distinfo. This means the port cannot compile.

The file is, however, identical to apr_dbd_mysql.rev-77.c in the same directory.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/apache22 && make patch
